name: Mexican Fondue
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh green chilli, seed removed and chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch cubes and place on a serving plate.
2. To make the sauce, heat oil in a saucepan over low heat. Add onion and garlic and cook gently until softened.
3. Stir in tomatoes and their juice, tomato puree, and chilli powder. Simmer, uncovered for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and blend until smooth. Return to heat and add chopped chili. Simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper. Serve with the meat cooked in oil.
